title: bridge-jmap apiUrl https-only check insufficient for SSRF (no hostname validation)
description: jmap.rs init_session() checks that the server-returned apiUrl starts with 'https://' but does not parse or validate the hostname/port. A malicious JMAP server can return apiUrl='https://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/' or 'https://10.0.0.1:6379/' to route JMAP API requests (with the Bearer token) to internal infrastructure. Fix: parse the URL, check the host against the session URL host (must match), or apply a private-IP blocklist.
